# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - prep
  - build
  - test
  - package
  - deploy

workflow:
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "web"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "schedule"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "api"
    - when: never

default:
  tags: []
  interruptible: true
  retry:
    max: 1
    when:
      - runner_system_failure
      - stuck_or_timeout_failure
  cache:
    key: "${CI_PROJECT_PATH_SLUG}-${CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH}"
    policy: pull-push
    paths:
      - .cache/
      - .m2/repository/
      - .gradle/
      - node_modules/
      - vendor/
  artifacts:
    when: always
    expire_in: 7 days
    paths:
      - dist/
      - build/
      - target/
      - out/
      - coverage/
      - reports/
      - junit.xml
      - gl-job-summary.txt

variables:
  GIT_STRATEGY: fetch
  GIT_DEPTH: "50"
  BUILD_SCRIPTS_DIR: ".ci"
  BUILD_SCRIPT_PREP: "prep.sh"
  BUILD_SCRIPT_BUILD: "build.sh"
  BUILD_SCRIPT_TEST: "test.sh"
  BUILD_SCRIPT_PACKAGE: "package.sh"
  BUILD_SCRIPT_DEPLOY: "deploy.sh"
  BUILD_SCRIPT_DEFAULT_SHELL: "bash"
  BUILD_SCRIPT_STRICT_MODE: "true"
  BUILD_SCRIPT_RUNNER_IMAGE: "alpine:3.20"
  BUILD_SCRIPT_TIMEOUT: "60m"
  BUILD_SCRIPT_ALLOW_MISSING: "true"
  BUILD_SCRIPT_VERBOSE: "false"
  BUILD_ENV_FILE: ".ci/env"
  CI_DEBUG_TRACE: "false"

.ci:run_script:
  image: "$BUILD_SCRIPT_RUNNER_IMAGE"
  before_script:
    - set -euo pipefail
    - apk add --no-cache bash coreutils findutils grep sed git openssh-client ca-certificates || true
    - mkdir -p "$BUILD_SCRIPTS_DIR" .cache
    - |
      if [ -f "$BUILD_ENV_FILE" ]; then
        set -a
        . "$BUILD_ENV_FILE"
        set +a
      fi
    - |
      run_ci_script() {
        local script_path="$1"
        local stage_name="$2"

        if [ "${BUILD_SCRIPT_ALLOW_MISSING:-true}" = "true" ] && [ ! -f "$script_path" ]; then
          echo "Skipping: $stage_name (missing $script_path; BUILD_SCRIPT_ALLOW_MISSING=true)" | tee -a gl-job-summary.txt
          return 0
        fi

        if [ ! -f "$script_path" ]; then
          echo "ERROR: Required script not found: $script_path" | tee -a gl-job-summary.txt
          exit 1
        fi

        if [ "${BUILD_SCRIPT_STRICT_MODE:-true}" = "true" ]; then
          set -euo pipefail
        else
          set +e
          set +u
        fi

        chmod +x "$script_path" || true

        if [ "${BUILD_SCRIPT_VERBOSE:-false}" = "true" ]; then
          echo "Running: $script_path" | tee -a gl-job-summary.txt
          env | sort | tee -a gl-job-summary.txt >/dev/null || true
          "$BUILD_SCRIPT_DEFAULT_SHELL" -lc "\"$script_path\""
        else
          echo "Running: $script_path" | tee -a gl-job-summary.txt
          "$BUILD_SCRIPT_DEFAULT_SHELL" -lc "\"$script_path\""
        fi
      }
  timeout: "$BUILD_SCRIPT_TIMEOUT"

prep:
  stage: prep
  extends: .ci:run_script
  script:
    - run_ci_script "${BUILD_SCRIPTS_DIR}/${BUILD_SCRIPT_PREP}" "prep"
  rules:
    - when: always

build:
  stage: build
  extends: .ci:run_script
  script:
    - run_ci_script "${BUILD_SCRIPTS_DIR}/${BUILD_SCRIPT_BUILD}" "build"
  rules:
    - when: always

test:
  stage: test
  extends: .ci:run_script
  script:
    - run_ci_script "${BUILD_SCRIPTS_DIR}/${BUILD_SCRIPT_TEST}" "test"
  rules:
    - when: always

package:
  stage: package
  extends: .ci:run_script
  script:
    - run_ci_script "${BUILD_SCRIPTS_DIR}/${BUILD_SCRIPT_PACKAGE}" "package"
  rules:
    - when: always

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  extends: .ci:run_script
  script:
    - run_ci_script "${BUILD_SCRIPTS_DIR}/${BUILD_SCRIPT_DEPLOY}" "deploy"
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
      when: manual
      allow_failure: false
    - when: never
